race.comment: DANCING TILDA (3) had strung together some sound efforts before struggling to run a strong 1635m at Grafton last start. Back to a more suitable journey today. Placed at both heavy track runs so this set-up looks ideal. HILLBILLY HIPPIE (10) produced an eye-catcher two back over this distance at Inverell then took on a $50k maiden over 1512m at Coffs Harbour last time and struggled. Back in her right race today so watch for a return to form. THE BIG TICKET (7) drove late but just missed at his latest appearance in a similar race to this. Has placed just three times in 37 starts but all those placings have come at Taree. Good each-way option. DURNESS (8) returned from an 18-week spell with a sound effort over this distance at Moree recently. Lightly raced four-year-old mare who can build on that performance. KIWI HARMONY (12) has been finding the line well in her races and handles heavy going so don't leave her out.
